parents.subject: LU-19587 tests: sanity/127e to drop cache

commit.subject: LU-19590 sec: hint client in case of failed cross MDT open
commit.message:
LU-19590 sec: hint client in case of failed cross MDT open

If a cross-MDT open fails with EACCES, hint the client
with ACL and group information in reply body.

Signed-off-by: Kaitlin Hoang <kthoang@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I7f13f4b0383097909d7b6bbf1313e12fcd693283
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62500
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
